name: hae-platform
description: HAE platform monorepo — one app per milestone module

scripts.deploy: npm run sync:hub && npm run build:all && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,auth
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run sync:hub && npm run build:all && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:hub: npm run sync:hub && firebase deploy --only hosting:hub
scripts.deploy:tracker: npm run build:tracker && firebase deploy --only hosting:tracker
scripts.deploy:lms: npm run build:lms && firebase deploy --only hosting:lms
scripts.deploy:eir: npm run build:eir && firebase deploy --only hosting:eir
scripts.deploy:crm: npm run build:crm && firebase deploy --only hosting:crm
scripts.deploy:ams: npm run build:ams && firebase deploy --only hosting:ams
